meanings.usage: 指利用风力推动船只行驶的活动或方式
正式用语，指大型船只或容器
描述给人留下深刻印象的事物
使某人想起某事的事物
指代代相传的风俗或习惯
指历史上具有特征的时期
表示在质量或能力上相当
指控制船只或车辆的方向
船上用于控制方向的装置
强调规模或程度非常大
指事情被推迟或延误的状态
指值得注意的、不寻常的
地球南北之间的假想线

phrases.usage: 出发；启程，指开始一段旅程

examples.en: Both ships set out from Shanghai on June 18th, 1872.
examples.zh: 两艘船于1872年6月18日从上海出发。

examples.en: On the Indian Ocean, the Cutty Sark took the lead.
examples.zh: 在印度洋上，卡蒂萨克号取得了领先。

phrases.usage: 被击中；遭受，指突然遭遇不好的事情

examples.en: In August, she was struck by a very heavy storm.
examples.zh: 八月，她遭遇了一场猛烈的暴风雨。

examples.en: Because of this, the Cutty Sark lost her lead.
examples.zh: 因此，卡蒂萨克号失去了领先地位。

phrases.usage: （船等）停靠，指在某个港口停留

examples.en: The captain called in at a port to have a new rudder fitted.
examples.zh: 船长将船停靠在一个港口，让工人安装新舵。

phrases.usage: 左右摇晃，形容船只不稳地晃动

examples.en: The Cutty Sark rolled from side to side and it became impossible to steer her.
examples.zh: 卡蒂萨克号左右摇晃，变得无法操控。

phrases.usage: 困难地安装，形容做某事很艰难

examples.en: A temporary rudder was made and it was fitted with great difficulty.
examples.zh: 一个临时舵被制造出来，但安装得非常困难。

phrases.usage: 毫无疑问...，用于强调确信某事

examples.en: There is no doubt that if she had not lost her rudder she would have won the race easily.
examples.zh: 毫无疑问，如果她没有失去舵，她会轻松赢得比赛。

examples.en: Before they were replaced by steamships, sailing vessels were used to carry tea.
examples.zh: 在被汽船取代之前，帆船被用来运茶。

grammar.title: 过去完成时 (Past Perfect Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某个时间点之前已经完成的动作或状态，常与一般过去时连用
grammar.usage: 用于描述发生在过去之前的事件，常用于复合句中

examples.en: The first of the two ships to reach Java after the race had begun was the Thermopylae.
examples.zh: 比赛开始后，第一艘到达爪哇的船是Thermopylae号。

examples.en: She had had many delays before arriving in England.
examples.zh: 她在到达英国之前经历了许多延误。

grammar.title: 虚拟语气 (Subjunctive Mood) - 与过去事实相反
grammar.definition: 用来表达与事实相反的假设或不可能发生的情况
grammar.structure: if + 主语 + had + 过去分词, 主语 + would/could/might have + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 用于谈论与过去事实相反的假设

examples.en: If she had not lost her rudder, she would have won the race easily.
examples.zh: 如果她没有失去舵，她本会轻松赢得比赛。

examples.en: If it had not rained, we would have gone out.
examples.zh: 如果没有下雨，我们本会出去。

grammar.title: 过去分词作定语 (Past Participle as Adjective)
grammar.definition: 过去分词可用作形容词，修饰名词，表示被动或完成的意义
grammar.structure: 过去分词 + 名词 或 名词 + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 用于简化定语从句，使句子更简洁

examples.en: The only other ship to match her was the Thermopylae.
examples.zh: 唯一能与她匹敌的另一艘船是Thermopylae号。

examples.en: She serves as an impressive reminder of the great ships of the past.
examples.zh: 她作为一个令人印象深刻的纪念物，提醒人们过去伟大的船只。

original.en: It seemed certain that she would be the first ship home.
original.zh: 她似乎是第一个到达的船，这似乎是确定的。

imitations.en: It seemed certain that he would pass the exam.
imitations.zh: 他似乎一定会通过考试。

imitations.en: It seemed certain that our team would win the match.
imitations.zh: 我们队似乎一定会赢得比赛。

original.en: There is no doubt that if she had not lost her rudder she would have won the race easily.
original.zh: 毫无疑问，如果她没有失去舵，她会轻松赢得比赛。

imitations.en: There is no doubt that hard work leads to success.
imitations.zh: 毫无疑问，努力工作会带来成功。

imitations.en: There is no doubt that she is the best student in the class.
imitations.zh: 毫无疑问，她是班上最好的学生。

sentencePatterns.pattern: The only other...to do something was...

original.en: The only other ship to match her was the Thermopylae.
original.zh: 唯一能与她匹敌的另一艘船是Thermopylae号。

imitations.en: The only other student to finish the test early was Tom.
imitations.zh: 唯一另一个提前完成考试的学生是汤姆。

imitations.en: The only other country to win the championship three times was Brazil.
imitations.zh: 唯一另一个三次赢得冠军的国家是巴西。

original.en: Because of this, the Cutty Sark lost her lead.
original.zh: 因此，卡蒂萨克号失去了领先地位。

imitations.en: Because of this, he decided to change his major.
Because of the heavy traffic, we arrived late.
imitations.zh: 因为交通拥堵，我们迟到了。
